title: Anti Combatlog test
description: Prevent combat logging with this datapack, by killing players when they are leaving while in combat.
body:
# Anti Combatlog Datapack This datapack is to prevent combat logging in Minecraft. When you get hit or you hit an entity you get put in combat mode for 20s (configurable). If the timer is active and you leave, you will get killed upon spawning. ### Change combat mode time As an operator you can run the command below to set the combat time.
`/scoreboard players set .config xv_combat_timer_seconds `
